settings.title: We source like food scientists, ship like a home cook.
settings.subtitle: Three rules, fifteen partners, three quality checks per batch. No shortcuts on what goes in the jar.

settings.heading: How we decide where things come from.
settings.item_1_desc: Every spice mix, every salt, every culture is sourced from a named lot. We log farm/supplier, harvest or production date, and lab-test reference for each. If we can't trace it, we don't ship it.
settings.item_2_desc: Irradiation kills bacteria — including the LAB we want. Standard "clean" treatments (ethylene oxide, methyl bromide) leave residues. We use cold storage, sealed packaging, and short supply chains instead.
settings.item_3_desc: Mustard from Kheda. Carrots from Punjab. Salt from Tuticorin. We import only when no Indian supplier exists at the quality we need (gochugaru from Korea, DVS yogurt cultures from Denmark).

settings.heading: The fifteen partners behind the kits.
settings.item_1_desc: Grown in Kheda district, Gujarat. Whole-pressed and stone-ground in our workshop within 7 days of receipt. Used in achaar, kanji, vegetable spice mixes.
settings.item_2_desc: Sourced from Punjab winter harvest (Nov–Feb). Frozen at -18°C within 12 hours of harvest, used as concentrate or whole for kanji kits.
settings.item_3_desc: Solar-evaporated from Tuticorin, Tamil Nadu. Iodine kills LAB — we exclude iodised salt entirely. Particle size 0.4–0.8mm for even brine.
settings.item_4_desc: From a Mumbai partner that supplies the city's commercial bakeries. Refrigerated chain throughout, 21-day shelf life from receipt.
settings.item_5_desc: Imported from a 3-generation farm in Sancheong, South Korea. Sun-dried, single-origin. The only Korean ingredient we don't substitute.
settings.item_6_desc: From a co-op in Belgium that supplies the EU's natural-food brands. Used as our prebiotic Ferment Boost. ~95% inulin content.

settings.heading: Every batch is tested three times.
settings.item_1_desc: Total viable count, presence of pathogens (Salmonella, Listeria, E. coli), water activity. NABL-accredited lab in Ahmedabad, results in 7 working days.
settings.item_2_desc: Salt percentage, moisture content, particle size, pH (where applicable). Confirms each batch matches the formulation. Done in-house with calibrated meters.
settings.item_3_desc: Two-person blind tasting against our reference batch. Catches anything the instruments miss — off-aromas, oxidation, texture changes. Done at packout, before sealing.

settings.title: See the licenses and certifications.
settings.desc: FSSAI, ISO 22000, HACCP, GMP, APEDA — the full filing.
